checks.description: All interactive controls can be reached and operated by keyboard.
Keyboard focus is clearly visible.
Page regions use headings and semantic landmarks.
Form controls have programmatic labels and instructions.
Async status and validation messages are announced.
Tables have headers and meaningful reading order.
Charts have text or table alternatives.
Animations respect reduced-motion preferences.
Text, controls, and focus indicators passed contrast review.
Errors identify the field and corrective action.
Primary controls meet usable touch-target sizing.
Core workflows remain usable at 200% zoom and narrow widths.

manual_validation_required: Screen-reader testing with at least one desktop and one mobile combination.
Keyboard-only completion of intake, review, export, and recovery workflows.
Zoom, reflow, contrast, and forced-colors review on representative pages.

required_actions: Apply defaults only for missing v1.16.0 sections.
Re-run governance and export readiness after migration.
migration_assessment.rollback: Restore the pre-migration recovery snapshot as a new draft; do not overwrite the source record.

warnings: Automated readiness cannot replace assistive-technology testing, restore drills, security review, or human release authorization.
This record is not certification, assurance, legal compliance, or professional sign-off.

packet.workflow: Knowledge Library → Research Librarian → Site Intelligence → Workbench → Research Lab → Platform Core → Decision Studio

required_reviews: professional review where regulated or safety-critical

warnings: Educational decision support only; not certification, assurance, legal, financial, engineering, medical, tax, compliance, or investment advice.
Audit entries are generated from user-provided inputs and imported artifacts; they must be reviewed before operational use.

blocking_reasons: Decision has not been approved by accountable human reviewers.

warnings: Decision Studio records governance actions but does not approve decisions autonomously.
AI may flag gaps or contradictions but cannot provide sign-off, certification, assurance, or regulated professional approval.

collaboration_room.title: Collaborative Decision Room
warnings: Decision Rooms are private collaboration records; WordPress authentication and authorization remain authoritative.
Comments and approvals are human records. AI cannot approve, sign, certify, or impersonate a reviewer.
Approved snapshots remain locked until an authorized human explicitly reopens the version with a reason.

boundaries: Monitoring records observed results and implementation evidence; it does not certify causality or performance.
Lifecycle amendments, suspension, and retirement require accountable human authorization.
Site Intelligence links provide evidence context; source methodology, freshness, and confidence remain visible.

accessibility.target: WCAG 2.2 AA-oriented product validation; final conformance requires human testing.

boundaries: No background approval, publishing, or external delivery while offline.
Institutional API credentials and private invitation tokens are never cached.
Queued write intents require authenticated replay and conflict review.

warnings: Automated checks cannot establish complete accessibility conformance.
Release readiness is an engineering gate, not legal certification, assurance, or professional sign-off.
